form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 4.5 lengths over 450m at this track (25.64). Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 4.5 lengths over 450m at this track (25.64). Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Got off the mark on debut over 300m at Healesville where she jumped from box 6 and scored a 1.3 lengths win in 16.81. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got off the mark on debut over 300m at Healesville where she jumped from box 6 and scored a 1.3 lengths win in 16.81. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (22.65) at this track in a Mix 6/7. Has first look at box 3 this time. Should have the speed for this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (22.65) at this track in a Mix 6/7. Has first look at box 3 this time. Should have the speed for this.

form.formComment: On debut last start won comfortably by 4.5 lengths at Mt Gambier (17.93) beating Costly Habits in a Maiden on March 26. Will find this tougher and may struggle.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Will need the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (23.90) at Bendigo. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (23.90) at Bendigo. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a seventh over 425m at Bendigo. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (24.45) at Horsham at last run and returns here after a three-and-a-half months break. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Makes plenty of appeal fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled and lost ground approaching home turn.
Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fifth over 410m at Horsham, beaten 9 lengths. Looks tested in this company.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Has ability and worth including.
